title: GeoPulse 1.32.2
highlights: Added trip replay controls for raster maps and improved replay controls across Timeline and trip details
Improved the mobile Timeline with a compact collapsible sheet, clearer trip selection, and better trip popups
Added a Timeline display setting to keep trip replay controls collapsed until you open them
Improved trip duration labels and Overland GPS accuracy filtering

title: GeoPulse 1.32.1
highlights: Fixed Immich photo markers on vector maps, including cluster expansion and click handling
Raised the train maximum average speed preference limit to 400 km/h
Timeline labels can now be hidden from DatePicker presets while remaining visible on timelines
Improved Timeline layout and PWA across mobile, tablet, and phone landscape viewports
